name: Carrollton Federal Bank
description_short: Carrollton Federal Bank is a community bank offering mobile banking, checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and financial planning tools with a faith-based foundation.
description_long:
Carrollton Federal Bank is a federally-regulated community bank operating under NMLS# 580191 with routing number 283972078. The institution emphasizes local community relationships, using the tagline "Other Banks Have Branches, We Have Roots" and incorporates faith-based values into its operations, citing Isaiah 53:4-6 on its homepage. The bank maintains an active web presence at carrolltonfederal.com with modern digital infrastructure.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking services including mobile banking via iOS and Android apps, SMS text banking, online account management, mortgage lending, auto loans, credit products, and check services. They provide financial calculators to help consumers with major financial decisions including home affordability, auto loan payments, mortgage calculations, debt payoff timelines, and retirement planning. Account holders can access 24/7 mobile banking for account management and fund transfers, with the ability to reorder checks online.

Carrollton Federal Bank distinguishes itself primarily through its community-focused business model and explicit faith-based positioning. Unlike larger national banks, they emphasize local decision-making and personal relationships. The bank actively maintains security measures, including protocols for lost or stolen cards (1-877-226-2351) and anti-fraud safeguards. They comply with the US Patriot Act and maintain clear privacy policies.

As a traditional community bank, Carrollton Federal Bank caters primarily to local depositors and borrowers seeking relationship-based banking rather than specialized financial products. The website provides limited detail on specific interest rates, fee structures, loan terms, or competitive advantages against larger regional or national banks. There is no information about account minimums, monthly fees, overdraft protection costs, or loan APRs, making it difficult for consumers to assess true value proposition without direct contact.
pros: Mobile banking available on both iOS and Android with SMS text banking option for account access anywhere
Community-focused approach emphasizing local roots and relationship banking rather than large corporate structure
Comprehensive suite of financial calculators for auto loans, mortgages, debt payoff, retirement planning, and budgeting
24/7 online and mobile account access for fund transfers and account management
Multiple contact channels including dedicated lost/stolen card phone line (877-226-2351)
Federally regulated institution with NMLS licensing and US Patriot Act compliance
Check reordering and financial planning services available online
cons: Website provides no information on interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules for comparison
Limited details on loan terms, account minimums, or monthly account fees
No information about ATM network access or branch locations visible on homepage
Website does not clearly specify which banking products are available or eligibility requirements
No transparency on competitive rates or terms compared to regional or national alternatives
best_for: Local community members seeking relationship-based banking with personal service
Consumers seeking a faith-aligned financial institution
Homebuyers and auto loan applicants needing mortgage and auto lending services
diagnosis: Carrollton Federal Bank is best for local community members and faith-oriented consumers seeking traditional relationship-based banking with modern mobile access. The primary caveat is that the website lacks transparent pricing, rates, and detailed product terms, requiring direct contact to evaluate competitive positioning against other regional banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
